headline: AXP Flies 22.8% in a Year: How Far Can the Price Rally Go?
summary: American Express jumps 22.8% in a year, outpacing peers as its premium strategy, AI push and strong spending trends signal further upside potential.

headline: Mastercard Incorporated to Host Conference Call on First Quarter 2026 Financial Results

headline: Mastercard: More Than A Payment Network, And Still Undervalued
summary: Mastercard (MA) long-term buy thesis: ~40% upside as high-margin value-added services hit 40% of revenue and grow fast. Read more macro analysis here.

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Mastercard, Visa and American Express
summary: Mastercard faces rising pressure from new payment rails but bets on AI, stablecoins and tokenization to stay ahead as Visa and AmEx take different paths.
